items.name: Festive Reindeer Pal
items.description: Introducing the Festive Reindeer Pal - your jolly holiday companion! This adorable limited-time addition brings the magic of Christmas to life. With its merry antlers and bright red nose, this reindeer is ready to spread joy and cheer wherever it roams. Join us in celebrating the season with this delightful friend, and let your avatar share in the holiday spirit!

items.name: Pinkie Gigabunny Little Backpack
items.description: He's the cutest creature you could find in an enchanted garden. With his soft ears and sweet gaze, he loves to accompany you on sunny picnics. Perfect for decorating magical corners, this giant bunny transforms any space into an adorable fairy tale.
